flashcards.front: What is collective communication in MPI?
flashcards.back: Communication operations that involve all processes in a communicator, requiring coordinated participation.

flashcards.front: Name three types of MPI reduction operations.
flashcards.back: MPI_SUM, MPI_MAX, MPI_MIN, MPI_PROD, MPI_LAND, MPI_LOR, MPI_BAND, MPI_BOR

flashcards.front: What is the purpose of MPI_Barrier?
flashcards.back: To synchronize all processes in a communicator, causing each process to block until all have reached the barrier.
MPI_Bcast sends the same data to all processes, while MPI_Scatter sends different chunks of data to different processes.

flashcards.front: What happens if processes don't consistently participate in collective operations?
flashcards.back: The program may deadlock or behave unpredictably, as collective operations require all processes in the communicator to participate.
